name: Stanford University
studentLife: Students often describe Stanford as ambitious but balanced, with strong startup culture and outdoor energy.
insiderTips: The alumni network is especially strong for startups and tech.
careerOutcomes: Top placement in tech and VC
vibeSummary: A sunny, high-achieving campus for builders and big thinkers.

name: UCLA
studentLife: UCLA blends intense academics with big-school energy, access to LA, and an outgoing student culture.
insiderTips: Use office hours early in large intro classes.
Internship access in LA is a huge advantage if you start early.
careerOutcomes: Strong media, healthcare, and tech recruiting
vibeSummary: Big-school spirit with serious academics and LA access.

name: University of Michigan
studentLife: Michigan is known for school pride, strong academics, and a classic college-town feel with major university resources.
insiderTips: Ann Arbor feels smaller and friendlier than many students expect.
Join clubs early because there are many niche communities.
careerOutcomes: Excellent placement across business, engineering, and consulting
vibeSummary: Classic college-town energy with top-tier academics and spirit.

name: New York University
studentLife: NYU feels deeply integrated into New York City, ideal for students who want independence and a fast-moving environment.
insiderTips: The city is your campus, so planning your routine matters.
You get the most out of NYU if you actively chase opportunities.
careerOutcomes: Strong placement in finance, media, and entertainment
vibeSummary: For students who want the city itself to be part of the college experience.

name: UNC Chapel Hill
studentLife: UNC offers strong academics, a welcoming social scene, and a traditional campus experience with strong community spirit.
insiderTips: The sense of school pride is real without feeling overwhelming.
Students who want balance often love it here.
careerOutcomes: Strong placement in healthcare, journalism, and business
Excellent alumni support in the Southeast
vibeSummary: Warm, balanced, and school-spirited with strong value.

name: Reed College
studentLife: Reed is known for intense intellectual curiosity, discussion-heavy classes, and a highly distinctive culture.
insiderTips: Visit if you can — fit matters a lot here.
Students who love ideas and discussion often thrive.
vibeSummary: A deeply intellectual, unconventional place for students who love ideas.

name: Arizona State University
studentLife: ASU offers a broad, energetic experience with lots of pathways, strong honors options, and an innovation-focused identity.
insiderTips: The honors college can make the experience feel much smaller.
There are a lot of opportunities if you proactively plug in.
careerOutcomes: Solid outcomes in business and engineering
vibeSummary: Flexible, energetic, and opportunity-rich with strong value.
